items.title: A2UI v0.9 Message Schema
items.description: Describes a JSON payload for an A2UI (Agent to UI) v0.9 message. Each message MUST include a 'version' field set to 'v0.9' and contain exactly ONE of the action properties: 'createSurface', 'updateComponents', 'updateDataModel', or 'deleteSurface'.

version.description: The A2UI protocol version. Must be 'v0.9'.

createSurface.description: Creates a new surface with the given ID and component catalog.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface to be created.

catalogId.description: The component catalog to use for rendering. Defaults to 'basic'.

updateComponents.description: Updates a surface with a new set of components using the v0.9 flat format.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface to be updated.

components.description: A flat list of all UI components for the surface. Each component has 'id', 'component' (string type name), and type-specific properties at the top level. One component MUST have id 'root'.

items.description: A single component. The 'component' field is a string naming the type, and all properties sit at the top level (flat format).

id.description: Unique identifier for this component within the surface.

weight.description: Relative weight within a Row or Column (CSS flex-grow). Only valid as a direct child of Row or Column.

text.description: For Text: the text content. Plain string for static text, or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding. Inside List templates use RELATIVE paths without leading slash (e.g., "name"). Outside templates use absolute paths with leading slash (e.g., "/title").

variant.description: Style variant. For Text: h1-h5, caption, body. For Image: size hint. For Button: default, primary, borderless. For TextField: longText, number, shortText, obscured. For ChoicePicker: multipleSelection, mutuallyExclusive.

url.description: For Image/Video/AudioPlayer: URL as a plain string or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding.

fit.description: For Image: how the image should be resized (CSS object-fit).

name.description: For Icon: icon name as a plain string or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding.

description.description: For AudioPlayer: description as a plain string or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding.

children.description: For Row/Column/List: either an array of child component IDs, or a template object for data-driven repeating children.

oneOf.description: Static list of child component IDs.
Template for data-driven children (typically used with List). 'componentId' is the template component ID, 'path' is the absolute data model path to the array (e.g., '/items').

componentId.description: The ID of the component to repeat for each item.

path.description: Absolute data model path to the array (e.g., '/items').

justify.description: For Row/Column: arrangement of children along the main axis.

align.description: For Row/Column/List: alignment of children along the cross axis.

child.description: For Card/Button: the ID of the single child component to render inside.

tabs.description: For Tabs: array of tab definitions.

title.description: Tab title as a plain string or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding.

child.description: The ID of the child component for this tab.

trigger.description: For Modal: the ID of the component that opens the modal when clicked.

content.description: For Modal: the ID of the component displayed inside the modal.

action.description: For Button: the action dispatched on click.

name.description: The action name dispatched to the server.

context.description: Key-value pairs for action context. Values can be literals (string, number, boolean) or data bindings ({"path": "fieldName"}). Example: {"name": {"path": "name"}, "id": "static-value"}.

label.description: For CheckBox/TextField/ChoicePicker/Slider: label as a plain string or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding.

value.description: For CheckBox (boolean), TextField (string), DateTimeInput (ISO 8601 string), Slider (number), ChoicePicker (string array): current value as a literal or {"path": "fieldName"} for data binding.

validationRegexp.description: For TextField: regex for client-side validation.

enableDate.description: For DateTimeInput: if true, allows date selection.

enableTime.description: For DateTimeInput: if true, allows time selection.

label.description: Option label as a plain string or {"path": "fieldName"}.

value.description: The stable value for this option.

filterable.description: For ChoicePicker: if true, shows a search input to filter options.

updateDataModel.description: Updates the data model for a surface with plain JSON values.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface this data model update applies to.

path.description: The path within the data model to update (e.g., '/user/name'). Defaults to '/' which replaces the entire data model.

value.description: The plain JSON value to set at the given path. Can be any valid JSON type.

deleteSurface.description: Signals the client to delete the surface identified by 'surfaceId'.

surfaceId.description: The unique identifier for the UI surface to be deleted.
